features.name: right_shift_with_underflow_computed_shift_amount
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation where the shift amount is computed from an underflowing subtraction

features.name: truncated_unsigned_addition_to_small_bitwidth
features.description: Code should include an addition that is truncated to a small bit width via implicit assignment

features.name: dynamic_shift_amount_from_underflow_subtraction
features.description: Code should include a subtraction that underflows to produce a shift amount used in a shift operation
